entries.subject: mathematics
entries.answer: CBSE mathematics learners should combine NCERT examples, board-pattern questions, and concept videos.

entries.subject: physics
entries.answer: School physics learners should pair simulations with short derivation drills and numericals.

entries.subject: computer science
entries.answer: University computer science learners should connect coursework to documentation, labs, and project evidence.

entries.subject: advanced
entries.answer: Advanced learners should use research papers, benchmark tasks, certification objectives, and portfolio artifacts.

entries.subject: general
entries.answer: School learners benefit from syllabus-aligned examples, Khan Academy explainers, and short daily practice.
